# Ramiro Ventura - Creative Full Stack Developer

> A portfolio showcasing a blend of technical full-stack expertise and creative interactive design.

## Website Sections
- [About me](https://www.ramiro-ventura.com/#about-me): Personal background, core values, and personality traits.
- [Work](https://www.ramiro-ventura.com/#work-section): A showcase of developed applications and websites.
- [Contacts](https://www.ramiro-ventura.com/#contacts-section): Professional links including GitHub, LinkedIn, and Email.

## Content Resume
Hello, my name is Ramiro Ventura.
I’m a creative and technical Full Stack developer. I consider myself introverted, curious, patient, and a fast learner. I am always hungry for more knowledge, especially in the fields of technology, programming, and music.
I take pride in my work and always strive for excellence. My core philosophy is to never have my creativity suppressed, ensuring every project has a unique, high-quality touch.

## Technical Notes
- **Desktop:** High-fidelity interactive experience powered by GSAP animations and advanced transitions.
- **Mobile:** Optimized, cleaner, and lightweight version focused on performance and readability.
